info.name: AA Chat API — Full Collection
info.description:
Complete REST + Socket.IO collection for AA Chat backend.

## Setup
1. Set `baseUrl` variable (default: `http://localhost:3000`)
2. Run **Auth / Register** or **Auth / Login** — the collection auto-saves `accessToken` and `refreshToken`
3. All protected endpoints use `{{accessToken}}` automatically via the collection-level Auth tab

## Variable Reference
| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `baseUrl` | Backend base URL |
| `accessToken` | JWT access token (auto-set on login/register) |
| `refreshToken` | JWT refresh token (auto-set on login/register) |
| `userId` | Current user ID (auto-set on login/register) |
| `roomId` | Room ID for room-scoped requests |
| `messageId` | Message ID |
| `fileId` | File ID |
| `inviteCode` | Room invite code |

item.name: 🔐 Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — register, login, token refresh, logout.

request.description:
Create a new account.

**Validation rules:**
- `username`: 3–50 chars, alphanumeric + underscore
- `password`: 8–100 chars, must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit, special char
- `displayName`: optional, max 100 chars

On success the test script saves `accessToken`, `refreshToken`, and `userId` to collection variables.

Authenticate with email + password.

On success saves `accessToken`, `refreshToken`, `userId` to collection variables.

Rotate the refresh token. Both old tokens are invalidated and new ones are returned.

Uses `{{refreshToken}}` collection variable. Updates both tokens on success.
Returns the authenticated user's profile from the JWT payload.
Invalidates the provided refresh token. The access token expires naturally (short-lived).
Revokes ALL refresh tokens for the current user. Forces re-login on every device.

item.name: 👤 Users
item.description: User profile management, settings, blocking.

query.description: Partial match on username or displayName

request.description: Paginated user list with optional search.
Returns sanitized profile for the authenticated user (no passwordHash).
Get any user's public profile by UUID.

All fields optional.

`status` enum: `online | away | dnd | offline`
Update the user's avatar URL. Typically called after uploading to S3 via the Files module.
Retrieve the current user's app settings (notifications, theme, language, timezone).

All fields optional.

`theme` enum: `light | dark | system`
Block a user by their UUID. Blocked users cannot send you DMs.
Remove a block relationship.
List all users the current user has blocked.

item.name: 🏠 Rooms
item.description: Room CRUD, membership management, invites.

request.description: Returns all rooms the current user is a member of. Optionally filter by `type` and `search`.

body.raw:
{
  "type": "group",
  "name": "My Team Room",
  "slug": "my-team-room",
  "description": "Private room for our team",
  "isPrivate": true,
  "memberIds": ["uuid-user-2", "uuid-user-3"]
}

request.description:
Create a new room.

**`type` enum:** `dm | group | channel`
- `dm` — exactly 2 members, no name required
- `group` — 2+ members, name required
- `channel` — broadcast channel, name required

`memberIds` max 100 UUIDs. Creator is automatically added as `owner`.

Saves `roomId` to collection variables on success.
Fetch full room details. User must be a member.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "uuid-room-1",
    "type": "group",
    "name": "My Team Room",
    "description": "Private room for our team",
    "isPrivate": true,
    "isArchived": false,
    "ownerId": "uuid-user-1",
    "memberCount": 3,
    "createdAt": "2026-04-01T10:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

request.description: Update room metadata. Requires `admin` or `owner` role.
Archive a room. Owner only. Archived rooms are read-only.
Restore an archived room. Owner only.
List all members with their roles, mute status, and join date.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description:
Change a member's role or mute status. Requires `admin` or `owner`.

`role` enum: `owner | admin | member`
`mutedUntil` — ISO8601 datetime, `null` to unmute
Kick a member from the room. Requires `admin` or `owner`.
Current user voluntarily leaves the room. If owner, must transfer ownership first.
Transfer owner role to another member. Current user becomes `admin`. Owner only.
Marks all messages in the room as read for the current user. Resets unread count.

Create a shareable invite link. Requires `admin` or `owner`.

- `maxUses`: 1–1000, omit for unlimited
- `expiresAt`: ISO8601 datetime, omit for no expiry

Saves `inviteId` and `inviteCode` to collection variables.
Get all active invite links for a room. Requires `admin` or `owner`.
Revoke an invite link.
Join a room using a short invite code (e.g. `AbCdEfGh`). The invite must not be expired or fully used.

item.name: 💬 Messages
item.description: Send, edit, delete, react, pin, and read messages. Thread support.

request.description:
Cursor-paginated message history for a room.

Pass the last message's `id` as `cursor` to get older messages.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "items": [
      {
        "id": "uuid-msg-1",
        "roomId": "uuid-room-1",
        "senderId": "uuid-user-1",
        "sender": { "id": "uuid-user-1", "username": "johndoe", "displayName": "John Doe", "avatarUrl": null },
        "content": "Hello team!",
        "type": "text",
        "parentId": null,
        "replyCount": 2,
        "reactions": { "👍": ["uuid-user-2"] },
        "isEdited": false,
        "isDeleted": false,
        "isPinned": false,
        "createdAt": "2026-04-01T10:00:00.000Z",
        "updatedAt": "2026-04-01T10:00:00.000Z"
      }
    ],
    "nextCursor": "uuid-msg-1",
    "hasMore": true
  }
}

request.description:
Send a message via HTTP. For real-time delivery prefer the Socket.IO `message:send` event.

`type` enum: `text | image | file | audio | system`
`parentId` — set to a message UUID to create a thread reply
`fileId` — UUID from Files module

Saves `messageId` to collection variables.

response.name: 201 Created
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "uuid-msg-1",
    "roomId": "uuid-room-1",
    "senderId": "uuid-user-1",
    "content": "Hello via REST!",
    "type": "text",
    "parentId": null,
    "reactions": {},
    "isEdited": false,
    "isDeleted": false,
    "createdAt": "2026-04-01T10:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

request.description: Fetch a single message.
Get replies to a threaded message.
Edit the content of a message. Own messages only. Sets `isEdited: true` and creates an edit history entry.
Soft-delete a message. Sets `isDeleted: true`, content is blanked. Own messages or admin/owner of room.
Get the full edit history of a message.
Toggle an emoji reaction. If the user already reacted with this emoji, it is removed (toggle behaviour).
Mark a specific message as read. Records a read receipt visible to other room members.
Get who has read this message and when.
Number of unread messages in a specific room for the current user.
Total unread message count across all rooms the user belongs to.
Get all pinned messages in a room.
Pin a message in the room. Requires `admin` or `owner`.
Unpin a message. Requires `admin` or `owner`.

item.name: 📁 Files
item.description: S3 presigned URL upload flow and file management.

request.description:
**Step 1 of 2-step S3 upload:**

Get a presigned PUT URL from S3.

1. Call this endpoint to get `presignedUrl` and `s3Key`
2. PUT the file binary directly to `presignedUrl` (no auth header)
3. Call **Confirm Upload** with `s3Key`

Saves `s3Key` to collection variables.

**Step 2 of 2-step S3 upload:**

After successfully PUTting the file to S3, confirm the upload here. This persists file metadata to the database.

Saves `fileId` to collection variables.

formdata.description: Optional room to attach file to

request.description:
Server-side upload. The server proxies the file to S3. Use for smaller files or when presigned URL flow is not available.

**Content-Type**: `multipart/form-data` (set automatically by Postman)
Get a short-lived presigned GET URL for downloading a private file.
List all files shared in a room. Optional MIME type filter.
Delete a file from S3 and the database. Own files or admin/owner of room.

item.name: 🔍 Search
item.description: Elasticsearch-powered full-text search across messages, users, and rooms.

request.description: Full-text search across all messages the user can access.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Autocomplete user search.
Autocomplete room search.
Trigger a full Elasticsearch reindex. Admin utility — use sparingly.

item.name: 🔔 Notifications
item.description: In-app notifications and Web Push subscriptions.

request.description:
Public endpoint. Returns the VAPID public key needed by the browser's Push API.

No authentication required.

Register a push subscription. Typically called after `navigator.serviceWorker.pushManager.subscribe()`.

`deviceType` enum: `web | android | ios`
Remove a specific push subscription by endpoint.
Removes ALL push subscriptions for the current user (all devices).
Get all active push subscriptions for the current user.
Get paginated in-app notifications. Notification types: `mention | dm | reaction | invite`
Badge count for the notification bell icon.
Mark specific notification IDs as read.
Mark every in-app notification as read. Resets the badge count to 0.

item.name: ❤️ Health
item.description: Kubernetes-style health probes and service status.

request.description: Returns status of all downstream services: PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch, memory heap, memory RSS, disk.
Kubernetes liveness probe. Returns 200 if the process is alive.
Kubernetes readiness probe. Returns 200 only if all services are ready to handle traffic.
Quick ping — no downstream checks.

item.name: ⚡ Socket.IO — Real-time
CONNECT + receive 'connected'
room:join
room:leave
item.description:
## Event: `room:leave` (Client → Server)

Leave a Socket.IO room. You will stop receiving real-time events for this room until re-joining.

### Emit payload
```json
{ "roomId": "uuid-room-1" }
```

### Acknowledgement
```json
{ "roomId": "uuid-room-1" }
```

item.name: message:send → broadcast message:new
item.description:
## Event: `message:send` (Client → Server)

Send a message via WebSocket. Preferred over REST for real-time delivery.

### Emit payload
```json
{
  "roomId": "uuid-room-1",
  "content": "Hello via Socket.IO!",
  "type": "text",
  "parentId": null,
  "fileId": null,
  "clientMessageId": "client-temp-uuid-001"
}
```

`clientMessageId` — your local temporary ID for optimistic UI updates.

### Acknowledgement
```json
{ "success": true, "messageId": "uuid-msg-new" }
```

---

## Event: `message:new` (Server → Client, broadcast)

Broadcast to **all members** in the room.

```json
{
  "id": "uuid-msg-new",
  "roomId": "uuid-room-1",
  "senderId": "uuid-user-1",
  "sender": {
    "id": "uuid-user-1",
    "username": "johndoe",
    "displayName": "John Doe",
    "avatarUrl": null
  },
  "content": "Hello via Socket.IO!",
  "type": "text",
  "parentId": null,
  "reactions": {},
  "isEdited": false,
  "isDeleted": false,
  "clientMessageId": "client-temp-uuid-001",
  "createdAt": "2026-04-01T10:00:00.000Z"
}
```

### Thread reply example
```json
{
  "roomId": "uuid-room-1",
  "content": "This is a thread reply",
  "type": "text",
  "parentId": "uuid-msg-1",
  "clientMessageId": "client-temp-uuid-002"
}
```

### File message example
```json
{
  "roomId": "uuid-room-1",
  "content": "Sharing a file",
  "type": "file",
  "fileId": "uuid-file-1"
}
```

item.name: message:edit → broadcast message:updated
item.description:
## Event: `message:edit` (Client → Server)

Edit a message via WebSocket. Own messages only.

### Emit payload
```json
{ "messageId": "uuid-msg-1", "content": "Edited content via socket" }
```

### Acknowledgement
```json
{ "success": true }
```

---

## Event: `message:updated` (Server → Client, broadcast)

Broadcast to all room members.

```json
{
  "id": "uuid-msg-1",
  "roomId": "uuid-room-1",
  "content": "Edited content via socket",
  "isEdited": true,
  "updatedAt": "2026-04-01T10:05:00.000Z"
}
```

item.name: message:delete → broadcast message:deleted
item.description:
## Event: `message:delete` (Client → Server)

Soft-delete a message via WebSocket.

### Emit payload
```json
{ "messageId": "uuid-msg-1" }
```

### Acknowledgement
```json
{ "success": true }
```

---

## Event: `message:deleted` (Server → Client, broadcast)

```json
{
  "messageId": "uuid-msg-1",
  "roomId": "uuid-room-1",
  "deletedAt": "2026-04-01T10:10:00.000Z"
}
```

item.name: message:react → broadcast message:reaction
item.description:
## Event: `message:react` (Client → Server)

Toggle an emoji reaction via WebSocket.

### Emit payload
```json
{ "messageId": "uuid-msg-1", "emoji": "👍" }
```

### Acknowledgement
```json
{ "success": true }
```

---

## Event: `message:reaction` (Server → Client, broadcast)

```json
{
  "messageId": "uuid-msg-1",
  "roomId": "uuid-room-1",
  "reactions": {
    "👍": ["uuid-user-1", "uuid-user-2"],
    "❤️": ["uuid-user-3"]
  },
  "actorId": "uuid-user-1"
}
```

item.name: message:read → broadcast message:read_receipt
item.description:
## Event: `message:read` (Client → Server)

Mark a message as read via WebSocket.

### Emit payload
```json
{ "roomId": "uuid-room-1", "messageId": "uuid-msg-1" }
```

### Acknowledgement
```json
{ "success": true }
```

---

## Event: `message:read_receipt` (Server → Client, broadcast)

```json
{
  "roomId": "uuid-room-1",
  "messageId": "uuid-msg-1",
  "userId": "uuid-user-2",
  "readAt": "2026-04-01T10:02:00.000Z"
}
```

item.name: typing:start → broadcast typing:user
item.description:
## Event: `typing:start` (Client → Server)

Notify room that the current user is typing. Auto-stops after 5 s of inactivity.

### Emit payload
```json
{ "roomId": "uuid-room-1" }
```

---

## Event: `typing:user` (Server → Client, broadcast to other members)

```json
{
  "roomId": "uuid-room-1",
  "userId": "uuid-user-1",
  "username": "johndoe"
}
```

**Note:** The server does NOT echo back to the sender.

item.name: typing:stop → broadcast typing:stop
item.description:
## Event: `typing:stop` (Client → Server)

Explicitly stop the typing indicator before the 5 s auto-timeout.

### Emit payload
```json
{ "roomId": "uuid-room-1" }
```

---

## Event: `typing:stop` (Server → Client, broadcast)

```json
{
  "roomId": "uuid-room-1",
  "userId": "uuid-user-1"
}
```

item.name: status:update → broadcast presence:updated
item.description:
## Event: `status:update` (Client → Server)

Update the current user's presence status.

### Emit payload
```json
{ "status": "away" }
```

`status` enum: `online | away | dnd`  
(Use `offline` only when disconnecting — it is set automatically)

### Acknowledgement
```json
{ "status": "away" }
```

---

## Event: `presence:updated` (Server → Client, broadcast to all user's rooms)

```json
{
  "userId": "uuid-user-1",
  "status": "away",
  "lastSeenAt": "2026-04-01T10:15:00.000Z"
}
```

item.name: heartbeat (keep-alive)
room:updated (Server → Client only)
item.description:
## Event: `room:updated` (Server → Client, broadcast)

Emitted when room metadata changes (name, description, archive status).

**This is a RECEIVE-only event** — clients cannot emit it.

### Received payload
```json
{
  "id": "uuid-room-1",
  "name": "Updated Name",
  "description": "Updated description",
  "isArchived": false,
  "updatedAt": "2026-04-01T10:20:00.000Z"
}
```

item.name: error (Server → Client only)
item.description:
## Event: `error` (Server → Client)

Emitted when an operation fails on the server side.

**This is a RECEIVE-only event.**

### Common error scenarios
| Scenario | message |
|---|---|
| Not a room member | `"Not authorized to join this room"` |
| Room not found | `"Room not found"` |
| Message too long | `"content must be shorter than or equal to 10000 characters"` |
| Rate limited | `"Too many requests"` |

### Received payload
```json
{ "message": "Not authorized to join this room" }
```

### JS example
```js
socket.on('error', (err) => {
  console.error('Socket error:', err.message);
  showToast(err.message, 'error');
});
```

item.name: 📖 Quick Reference
item.description:
## Global Response Envelope

All REST responses are wrapped by `TransformInterceptor`:

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { /* actual payload */ },
  "timestamp": "2026-04-01T10:00:00.000Z",
  "path": "/api/v1/..."
}
```

## Error Response

```json
{
  "statusCode": 400,
  "message": "Validation failed: content must be a string",
  "error": "Bad Request"
}
```

## Enums

| Enum | Values |
|---|---|
| `RoomType` | `dm`, `group`, `channel` |
| `MemberRole` | `owner`, `admin`, `member` |
| `MessageType` | `text`, `image`, `file`, `audio`, `system` |
| `UserStatus` | `online`, `away`, `dnd`, `offline` |
| `Theme` | `light`, `dark`, `system` |
| `DeviceType` | `web`, `android`, `ios` |
| `NotificationType` | `mention`, `dm`, `reaction`, `invite` |
| `SearchSortOrder` | `relevance`, `newest`, `oldest` |

## Pagination Patterns

**Offset pagination** (Users list)
```
GET /users?page=2&limit=20
```

**Cursor pagination** (Messages, Notifications)
```
GET /rooms/:id/messages?cursor=<lastMessageId>&limit=30
```
Next page: pass `data.nextCursor` as `cursor`. Stop when `hasMore: false`.

## Authentication Header

```
Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...
```

## Rate Limiting

Auth endpoints are rate-limited. Headers returned:
```
x-ratelimit-limit: 10
x-ratelimit-remaining: 9
```
429 is returned when exceeded.
